rationale: Active war remains the overwhelming reality for Ukrainian residents; EU accession talks advancing is a modest positive signal; US focus on Iran deal and Beirut strikes continue to compete for Western attention.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues (active combat, no qualitative change)
top_events.summary: The war continues at the same devastating intensity for Ukrainian civilians — no ceasefire, no major territorial shift reported this cycle; daily life under bombardment and mobilization pressure persists.

top_events.title: EU set to hold membership talks with Ukraine
top_events.summary: Formal EU membership talks advancing is a meaningful positive signal for Ukraine's long-term future and morale, though it does not change the immediate war situation.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal close; Israel strikes Beirut same day
top_events.summary: US diplomatic focus on Iran and the Middle East continues to divert attention and potentially resources from Ukraine; no direct aid cut announced but the distraction risk remains real.
